title: Build failure: FastAPI module import incompatibility
evidence: app.py:127 instantiation fails: TypeError: Router.__init__() got an unexpected keyword argument 'on_startup'. This suggests Starlette 1.0 removed on_startup parameter.
suggestion: Pin FastAPI version (e.g., fastapi<0.100) or update to use lifespan parameter instead

title: Tests cannot execute due to build failure
evidence: pytest collection fails when importing test_app.py:7 — app.py:127 fails to instantiate. No tests can run.
suggestion: Fix FastAPI compatibility first; 5 tests written but cannot verify execution

title: POST /books endpoint
evidence: app.py:68-77 — implements POST with 201 status, accepts title/author/year/isbn, validates via Pydantic. Code correct but untested.
suggestion: Fix build to verify test execution

title: GET /books with ?author= filter
evidence: app.py:79-88 — accepts optional author Query param, filters SQL WHERE. Code correct but untested.
suggestion: Fix build to verify test execution

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: app.py:90-96 — returns 404 if not found. Code correct but untested.
suggestion: Fix build to verify test execution

title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: app.py:98-111 — full update with 404 on missing. Code correct but untested.
suggestion: Fix build to verify test execution

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: app.py:113-122 — returns 204 status, 404 on missing. Code correct but untested.
suggestion: Fix build to verify test execution

title: SQLite database storage
evidence: app.py:11-25 — init_db creates books table, get_conn manages connections properly

title: JSON responses with HTTP status codes
evidence: app.py:68 (201), 98 (200), 113 (204), HTTPException (404). Proper status codes throughout.

title: Input validation
evidence: app.py:39-43 — BookIn model uses Field(..., min_length=1) for title and author

title: README.md with setup/run instructions
evidence: README.md provides pip install, uvicorn run, endpoint docs, and pytest command

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: test_app.py:20-84 — 5 well-written tests (health, create+get, validation, list+filter, update+delete). Cannot verify execution due to build failure.
suggestion: Fix build to verify tests pass

title: Use modern type annotation syntax
evidence: app.py:42,43,80 — ruff UP045: Optional[int]/Optional[str] should use int|None / str|None syntax
suggestion: Modernize to X | None for Python 3.10+

title: Import sorting issue
evidence: test_app.py:1-7 — ruff I001: imports need reordering (stdlib first, then third-party)
